methodology: need_score = 100 * (0.40*food_insecurity_proxy + 0.30*low_access + 0.20*poverty_norm + 0.10*(1-income_norm)). Food insecurity proxy derived from poverty + unemployment (per Feeding America's Map the Meal Gap methodology). Low-access derived from USDA Rural-Urban Continuum Code. Sources: USDA ERS, U.S. Census ACS.
